'''Jyn Obah''' was a [[Schiav]] [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and first mate to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gir Kybo Ren-Cha]] during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Jyn served aboard Captain Kybo's personal attack [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the [[Dianoga (starship)|''Dianoga'']] as well as his capital destroyer, the ''[[Demolisher]]''. When the crew were not flying through space looking for new [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] to plunder, they retreated to their secret base of operations on the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of [[Tarnoonga/Legends|Tarnoonga]].

On one occasion, Captain Kybo kidnapped the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] known as [[Jessica Meade]]. He kept her secured in his ready room on Tarnoonga, but Jessica escaped and ran directly into Jyn Obah. Jyn tried to grab a hold of her, but Jessica evaded him and ran back towards her freighter. Jyn gave chase and tried to stop her before she could enter the ship. Jess halted Jyn's advances by trapping him between the [[Blast door/Legends|blast doors]] of her ship. Once incapacitated, she freed him and blasted off from Tarnoonga.

Later, Jyn discovered that Captain Kybo had been arrested by King [[Mon Julpa]] of [[Tammuz-an/Legends|Tammuz-an]] and held prisoner at the royal palace. He snuck onto the planet and broke Kybo out of his cell. They managed to temporarily avoid detection by disguising themselves as natives of Tammuz-an. Soldiers under the command of Mon Julpa and Lord [[Malameu Toda]] eventually discovered their plot and gave chase. They managed to capture Jyn Obah, but Captain Kybo escaped.

==Physical appearance==
Jyn Obah was a large Schiav. He had tan-colored skin, long brown hair and two fangs projecting upward from his bottom jaw. He wore [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]]—none of which fit him properly. He also wore a black [[Body glove/Legends|body glove]], which likewise, was several sizes too small. His most distinguishing accoutrement was a large hoop nose-ring, which he wore through both nostrils.

==Behind the scenes==
He was voiced by [[Dan Hennessey]].
